hooks.command: msg=$(jq -r '.message // empty'); if echo "$msg" | grep -qi 'gradle-build\|build the project'; then cd /Users/konst/projects/london-gems && JAVA_HOME=/Users/konst/Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/corretto-17.0.17/Contents/Home ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android_sdk ./gradlew assembleDebug 2>&1 | tail -80; else exit 0; fi
